title: Device  Home Screen - Starting app without internet connection
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app home screen fails to load images and internet-dependent features when opened without network connectivity, but recovers after reconnecting
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure the app is connected to the internet (Wi-Fi or cellular) and a Poly Bluetooth audio device is paired and displayed on the Home screen.
3. Close the app or minimize it.
4. Turn off all internet connections on the mobile device (disable both Wi-Fi and cellular data).
5. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Observe the Home screen for the paired device and any internet-dependent content (e.g., images, banners, or promotional graphics).
7. Reconnect the mobile device to the internet (enable Wi-Fi or cellular data).
8. Observe the Home screen again for the paired device and internet-dependent content.
expected: When the app is opened without an internet connection, the paired device should still be displayed on the Home screen. Internet-dependent features (e.g., images on the Home page) may be missing or not loaded. After reconnecting to the internet, all data and images should load and display properly.
